mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate transmits through lower discount rates and easier financial conditions, lifting S&P 500 prices over the next month. The signal is directional only when policy is in an easing sequence rather than a flat or rising path.
failure_condition: If FEDFUNDS declines but 20-day SPX returns are negative in more than 60% of such episodes, or rolling 3-year rank IC stays below 0.03, reject the mechanism.

mechanism_narrative: A CPIAUCSL acceleration above recent inflation prints implies tighter real-rate pressure and valuation compression, so S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days turn negative. The effect is strongest when inflation surprises are broad rather than isolated.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL rises above its 6-month moving average by more than 0.4%
failure_condition: Reject if inflation breakouts are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 55% of cases, or if the signal's rank IC is not negative in any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE combined with slowing PAYEMS growth indicates labor-market deterioration that reduces earnings expectations and increases recession odds, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month. The effect requires both weakening employment and rising unemployment.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered labor-deterioration episodes produce positive 20-day SPX returns more than 40% of the time, or if the joint signal does not outperform either proxy alone.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in RSAFS signals stronger consumer demand and revenue growth expectations, which support equity prices over the following quarter. The mechanism is strongest when sales growth is broad-based rather than inflation-driven.
failure_condition: Reject if rising retail sales are not associated with positive 60-day SPX returns in at least 55% of cases, or if the rolling 3-year rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rising INDPRO paired with stable or falling UNRATE indicates improving productive activity without labor-market stress, which should support S&P 500 returns over the next month. The signal fails when production gains come from inventory effects rather than genuine output improvement.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises by more than 0.5% over 2 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered production-strength episodes fail to deliver positive 20-day SPX returns in at least 60% of cases, or if UNRATE does not improve the hit rate versus INDPRO alone.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in HOUST signals weakening housing demand and reduced cyclical growth momentum, which lowers equity returns over the next month. The effect is expected when housing weakness persists beyond one release.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls for 2 consecutive monthly observations
failure_condition: Reject if consecutive housing declines are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 55% of instances, or if the signal's rolling rank IC is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS growth weakens while UNRATE rises, the labor market is deteriorating faster than headline activity can absorb, and S&P 500 returns should turn negative over the next week. This is a fast-moving recession-warning signal rather than a valuation signal.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average payroll growth turns negative
failure_condition: Reject if triggered labor-slowdown episodes do not produce negative 5-day SPX returns in at least 55% of cases, or if the joint signal is not stronger than either series alone.

mechanism_narrative: In a tightening cycle, a high FEDFUNDS level coupled with above-trend CPIAUCSL suppresses equity multiples and forward returns over the next quarter. The effect is regime-specific and should disappear when policy is clearly easing.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS > 4.5% and CPIAUCSL above its 12-month trend
failure_condition: Reject if tightening-plus-inflation episodes fail to produce negative 60-day SPX returns in more than 55% of instances, or if the signal remains negative in easing regimes.
